节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: File URI.
File size, in bytes. If type is dir, the length value is fixed to 0.

Timestamp when the file is stored, which is the number of milliseconds elapsed since 1970/01/01 00:00:00. For lite wearables, the value is fixed to 0, because this parameter is restricted by the underlying file system.
File type. The values are as follows: dir: directory file: file
File list. When the recursive value is true and the type is dir, the file information under the subdirectory will be returned. Otherwise, no value will be returned.

URI of the file to move. Restricted by the underlying file system of lite wearables, the value must meet the following requirements: 1. The URI cannot contain special characters such as \/"*+,:;<=>?[]|\x7F. 2. The maximum number of characters allowed is 128.

URI of the file moved to the target location. Restricted by the underlying file system of lite wearables, the value must meet the following requirements: 1. The URI cannot contain special characters such as \/"*+,:;<=>?[]|\x7F. 2. The maximum number of characters allowed is 128.
Called when the source file is moved to the specified location successfully. This function returns the URI of the file moved to the target location.
Called when moving fails.
Called when the execution is completed.

URI of the directory. Restricted by the underlying file system of lite wearables, the value must meet the following requirements: 1. The URI cannot contain special characters such as \/"*+,:;<=>?[]|\x7F. 2. The maximum number of characters allowed is 128.
Called when the list is obtained successfully.
Called when the list fails to be obtained.
Called when the execution is completed.

URI of the file to copy. Restricted by the underlying file system of lite wearables, the value must meet the following requirements: 1. The URI cannot contain special characters such as \/"*+,:;<=>?[]|\x7F. 2. The maximum number of characters allowed is 128.

URI of the file moved to the target location. Restricted by the underlying file system of lite wearables, the value must meet the following requirements: 1. The URI cannot contain special characters such as \/"*+,:;<=>?[]|\x7F. 2. The maximum number of characters allowed is 128.
Called when the copy file is saved successful. This function returns the URI of the file saved to the target location.
Called when the copy or save operation fails.
Called when the execution is completed.

File URI, which cannot be an application resource path. Restricted by the underlying file system of lite wearables, the value must meet the following requirements: 1. The URI cannot contain special characters such as \/"*+,:;<=>?[]|\x7F. 2. The maximum number of characters allowed is 128.
Whether to recursively obtain the file list under a subdirectory. The default value is false.
Called when file information is obtained successfully.
Called when file information fails to be obtained.
Called when the execution is completed.

URI of the file to be deleted, which cannot be an application resource path. Restricted by the underlying file system of lite wearables, the value must meet the following requirements: 1. The URI cannot contain special characters such as \/"*+,:;<=>?[]|\x7F. 2. The maximum number of characters allowed is 128.
Called when local files are deleted successfully.
Called when the deletion fails.
Called when the execution is completed.

URI of a local file. If it does not exist, a file will be created. Restricted by the underlying file system of lite wearables, the value must meet the following requirements: 1. The URI cannot contain special characters such as \/"*+,:;<=>?[]|\x7F. 2. The maximum number of characters allowed is 128.
Character string to write into the local file.
Encoding format. The default format is UTF-8.
Whether to enable the append mode. The default value is false.
Called when texts are written into a file successfully.
Called when texts fail to be written into a file.
Called when the execution is completed.

URI of a local file. Restricted by the underlying file system of lite wearables, the value must meet the following requirements: 1. The URI cannot contain special characters such as \/"*+,:;<=>?[]|\x7F. 2. The maximum number of characters allowed is 128.
Encoding format. The default format is UTF-8. Currently, only UTF-8 is supported.
Position where the reading starts. The default value is the start position of the file.
Position where the reading starts. The default value is the start position of the file.
Called when texts are read successfully.
Called when texts fail to be read.
Called when the execution is completed.

URI of a local file. If it does not exist, a file will be created. Restricted by the underlying file system of lite wearables, the value must meet the following requirements: 1. The URI cannot contain special characters such as \/"*+,:;<=>?[]|\x7F. 2. The maximum number of characters allowed is 128.
Buffer from which the data is derived.
Offset to the position where the writing starts. The default value is 0.
Whether to enable the append mode. The default value is false. If the value is true, the position parameter will become invalid.
Called when data from a buffer is written into a file successfully.
Called when data from a buffer fails to be written into a file.
Called when the execution is completed.

URI of a local file. Restricted by the underlying file system of lite wearables, the value must meet the following requirements: 1. The URI cannot contain special characters such as \/"*+,:;<=>?[]|\x7F. 2. The maximum number of characters allowed is 128.
Position where the reading starts. The default value is the start position of the file.
Length of the content to read. If this parameter is not set, all content of the file will be read.
Called when the buffer data is read successfully.
Called when the buffer data fails to be read.
Called when the execution is completed.

URI of the directory or file. Restricted by the underlying file system of lite wearables, the value must meet the following requirements: 1. The URI cannot contain special characters such as \/"*+,:;<=>?[]|\x7F. 2. The maximum number of characters allowed is 128.
Called when the check result is obtained successfully.
Called when the check fails.
Called when the execution is completed.

URI of the directory. Restricted by the underlying file system of lite wearables, the value must meet the following requirements: 1. The URI cannot contain special characters such as \/"*+,:;<=>?[]|\x7F. 2. The maximum number of characters allowed is 128. 3. A maximum of five recursions are allowed for creating the directory.
Whether to create the directory after creating its upper-level directory recursively. The default value is false.
Called when the directory is created successfully.
Called when the creation fails.
Called when the execution is completed.

URI of the directory. Restricted by the underlying file system of lite wearables, the value must meet the following requirements: 1. The URI cannot contain special characters such as \/"*+,:;<=>?[]|\x7F. 2. The maximum number of characters allowed is 128.
Whether to delete files and subdirectories recursively. The default value is false.
Called when the directory is deleted successfully.
Called when the deletion fails.
Called when the execution is completed.
Moves the source file to a specified location.
Copies a source file and save the copy to a specified location.
Obtains the list of files in a specified directory.
Obtains information about a local file.
Deletes local files.
Writes texts into a file.
Reads texts from a file.
Writes data from a buffer into a file.
Reads buffer data from a file.
Checks whether a file or directory exists.
Creates a directory.
Deletes a directory.
